lede: A look at June 27 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Kelee Ringo and Bryan Fletcher (skier), and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: President of the United States
events.desc: U.S. President Joe Biden debates former U.S. President Donald Trump. Biden's perceived poor performance leads to his withdrawal from the election on July 21.

events.title: 2017 Ukraine ransomware attacks
events.desc: A series of powerful cyberattacks using the Petya malware target websites of Ukrainian organizations and counterparts with Ukrainian connections around the globe.

events.title: Space Shuttle Atlantis
events.desc: Space Shuttle Atlantis launches on STS-71, the first space shuttle mission to dock with the Russian space station Mir.

events.title: Aum Shinrikyo
events.desc: Members of the Aum Shinrikyo cult release sarin gas in Matsumoto, Japan. Seven people are killed, 660 injured.

events.title: Hurricane Audrey
events.desc: Hurricane Audrey makes landfall near the Texas–Louisiana border, killing over 400 people, mainly in and around Cameron, Louisiana.

events.title: Korean War
events.desc: The United States decides to send troops to fight in the Korean War.

events.title: Romania in World War II
events.desc: Romanian authorities launch one of the most violent pogroms in Jewish history in the city of Iași, resulting in the murder of at least 13,266 Jews.

events.title: Circumnavigation
events.desc: The first solo circumnavigation of the globe is completed by Joshua Slocum from Briar Island, Nova Scotia.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: Confederate forces defeat Union forces during the Battle of Kennesaw Mountain during the Atlanta campaign.

deaths.text: John Entwistle, English singer-songwriter, bass guitarist, and producer
Jaan Lattik, Estonian pastor and politician, 9th Minister of Foreign Affairs of Estonia
Élisabeth Jacquet de La Guerre, French harpsichord player and composer

observances.text: Christian feast day: Crescens, one of the Seventy disciples
Christian feast day: Cyril of Alexandria (Coptic Church, Roman Catholic Church, Anglican Communion and Lutheran Church)
Christian feast day: Ladislaus I of Hungary
Christian feast day: Our Lady of Perpetual Help
